task_completion.description: Calculate per-voyage EEOI and fuel efficiency metrics
task_completion.visual_evidence: Spreadsheet contains new columns for EEOI (values typically between 7.59 and 17.10) and Fuel Efficiency (MT fuel per nautical mile).
A cell showing the total fleet CO2 emissions calculated as Fuel * 3.114. The correct total should be approximately 698,018 tonnes.

task_completion.description: Identify the three worst-performing vessels by average EEOI
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table, list, or chart explicitly highlighting or listing exactly 3 vessels with the highest average EEOI.

task_completion.description: Quantify the impact of weather conditions on fuel efficiency
task_completion.visual_evidence: A pivot table, summary table, or chart grouping data by weather conditions and showing the corresponding average fuel efficiency.

task_completion.description: Include a fleet summary dashboard and save as fleet_performance_report.xlsx
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashboard layout (combining charts and summary tables) is visible, and the application title bar or save dialog shows the filename 'fleet_performance_report.xlsx'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a GUI spreadsheet application to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a spreadsheet application interface (e.g., LibreOffice Calc), not just a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that calculations are performed using spreadsheet formulas or built-in tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar shows actual formulas (e.g., for EEOI, sums, or averages) or pivot tables are actively used, rather than hardcoded numbers being pasted in.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just run a Python script to generate the final Excel file without interacting with the data visually
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows step-by-step interaction with the spreadsheet software (creating columns, making pivot tables, formatting the dashboard).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 150 voyages across 12 vessels. The CO2 conversion factor is 3.114. Correct EEOI values range between 7.59 and 17.10 g CO2/tonne-mile. Note: The actual total fuel consumed across all voyages in the generated data is 224,154.9 MT, resulting in a total fleet CO2 emission of exactly 698,018.36 tonnes. The agent should calculate this correct value (approx 698k tonnes) rather than any other expected range.
